mapper.insert: UPDATE attendance SET COUNT = COUNT + 1, ATTEND_DAYS = SYSDATE WHERE MEM_NO = #{memNo}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ATTENDANCE WHERE MEM_NO = #{memNo} AND TRUNC(ATTEND_DAYS) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO ATTENDANCE a USING DUAL ON (a.MEM_NO = #{memNo}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET ATTEND_DAYS = SYSDATE, COUNT = a.COUNT + 1 WHERE TRUNC(ATTEND_DAYS) < TRUNC(SYSDATE) -- 오늘 이미 했으면 업데이트 안 함 WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (MEM_NO, ATTEND_DAYS, COUNT) VALUES (#{memNo}, SYSDATE, 1)
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(COUNT) FROM ATTENDANCE WHERE MEM_NO = #{memNo}
